category_sources: source_facts.description identifies CCfits as a C++ interface for FITS astronomy data files.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official HEASARC CCfits documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage identify CCfits as a C++ interface to CFITSIO/FITS files.
